personality_one_liner: A modern, academic communication platform blending LinkedIn's professional clarity with WhatsApp's functional messaging, rooted in a fresh moss green and terracotta palette.

spacing.rule: Maintain strict 8pt grid. Generous horizontal padding (lg/xl) around feed cards. No orphan layout cards.

do's: Use translucent frosted glass for the bottom tab bar and sticky headers.
Apply glass effects on floating action buttons (FAB) layered over a brand tint.
Use a tinted base beneath blur layers to ensure readability.
dont's: Do not apply blur to individual feed cards, chat bubbles, or list items.
Never blur form fields or body text regions.

screens.name: Splash & Onboarding
screens.purpose: Introduce the platform with high-quality academic imagery and fresh messaging.
screens.layout: Full-bleed academic/campus hero images. Overlay a top-to-bottom vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surfaceInverse) to guarantee text contrast. Title and primary CTA at the bottom 30% of the screen. CTA is a large 'pill' styled button.

screens.name: Feed
screens.purpose: A LinkedIn-style clean public feed displaying campus announcements and group activity.

states.loading: Skeleton loader with card shapes matching feed items.
states.empty: Illustration of a noticeboard + 'No announcements yet' + CTA to explore groups.

screens.layout: Split header with a compact personalized widget at the top (next class/event), followed by infinite scroll social feed. Cards use 'surfaceSecondary', 'md' radius, and 1px 'border'. Rich media should span full width within cards.

screens.name: Group Chat
screens.purpose: WhatsApp-grade usability for real-time institutional communication.

states.empty: Empty state illustration + 'Start the conversation' message.
states.error: Failed to load messages + Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky frosted header showing group identity. Asymmetrical chat flow. Own messages: aligned right, 'brandPrimary' background, 'onBrandPrimary' text. Received: aligned left, 'surfaceSecondary' background. Bottom dock expands gracefully for typing. Include micro-interactions for replies and mentions.

screens.name: Discover (Channels/Groups)
screens.purpose: Telegram-style directory for public discovery of clubs and institution channels.

states.empty: Search icon + 'No groups match your criteria'.

screens.layout: Horizontal scrollable pill list at the top for filtering categories. Vertical grid (2-column on wider screens, single column list on smaller) below it. Cards feature large top banner imagery, bold group titles, short descriptors, tags, and a prominent 'Join' button.

screens.name: Profile/Settings
screens.purpose: Clean, LinkedIn-style profile setup and extensive settings management.
screens.layout: Hero profile section with a tinted background or cover banner. List rows for settings (Notifications, Theme, Privacy, Storage, etc.) utilizing a 56pt tappable height. Feature rows should use a 'brandTertiary' tinted icon container on the left, followed by the setting name, and a chevron on the right.

onboarding_hero_1.alt: Wide shot of a college campus building

onboarding_hero_2.alt: College campus building with green grass

avatar_student_1.alt: Portrait of a young male student

avatar_student_2.alt: Portrait of a young female student sitting outdoors

discover_group_event.alt: Diverse group of college students interacting indoors

discover_group_campus.alt: Students hanging out outside a modern university building

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply the Moss Green (#2E5C4E) and Terracotta (#E87A5D) palette meticulously across components to ensure it feels institutional but modern. Do NOT default to generic blue or purple.
Enforce a strict 8pt grid system. Maintain generous padding ('lg' or 'xl') around the main content blocks to ensure high readability.
Implement 'Glassmorphism with a Human Touch' using 'expo-glass-effect' exclusively for bottom tab bars and sticky headers. Body elements and feed cards should remain solid.
Always apply a top-to-bottom gradient scrim (using 'expo-linear-gradient') beneath text overlaid on hero imagery to guarantee WCAG contrast compliance.

For the Group Chat interface, prioritize asynchronous text communication. Left align received messages (solid surfaceSecondary background) and right align sent messages (solid brandPrimary background). Include micro-interactions for timestamps and read status.
Build the Feed screen with a LinkedIn-like polish: use rounded 'md' cards, clear typography scales (Max 500 font weight), and distinctive avatars with role tags.
Develop a rich 'Discover' tab featuring horizontal scrollable category pills at the top, and a vertical grid of Group Cards below, each utilizing the provided campus/event imagery.
Ensure 'haptics' are properly wired via 'expo-haptics' using the designated schema in this file.
